translations.auth.login.headline: Your care, all in one place.
translations.auth.login.lede: Sign in to reach your records, your team, and everything Hospital Santa María keeps for you — securely, whenever you need it.
translations.auth.login.reassure.account: One account for everything you do here
translations.auth.login.title: Welcome back
translations.auth.login.subtitle: Sign in to continue.
translations.auth.login.username.label: Username
translations.auth.login.password.label: Password
translations.auth.recoverUsername.headline: Forgot your username?
translations.auth.recoverUsername.lede: Tell us the email on your account and we'll send your username so you can sign back in.
translations.auth.recoverUsername.reassure.username: You sign in with your username, not your email
translations.auth.recoverUsername.reassure.privacy: We never reveal whether an email is registered
translations.auth.recoverUsername.sent.title: Check your email
translations.auth.recoverUsername.sent.message: If an account exists for that email, we've sent your username. It may take a minute to arrive — and remember to check spam.
translations.auth.recoverUsername.title: Recover your username
translations.auth.recoverUsername.subtitle: We'll email it to the address on your account.
translations.auth.recoverUsername.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
translations.auth.recoverUsername.email.label: Email
translations.auth.requestReset.headline: Let's get you back in.
translations.auth.requestReset.lede: Enter the email on your account and we'll send a secure link to set a new password. The link expires soon, so use it right away.
translations.auth.requestReset.reassure.privacy: We never share whether an email is registered
translations.auth.requestReset.sent.title: Check your email
translations.auth.requestReset.sent.message: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a link to reset your password. It may take a minute to arrive — and remember to check spam.
translations.auth.requestReset.title: Reset your password
translations.auth.requestReset.subtitle: We'll email you a link to choose a new one.
translations.auth.requestReset.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
translations.auth.requestReset.email.label: Email
translations.auth.resetPassword.headline: Choose a new password.
translations.auth.resetPassword.lede: Pick something only you would know — at least 8 characters. You'll use it to sign in from now on.
translations.auth.resetPassword.reassure.secure: Your new password is stored securely
translations.auth.resetPassword.reassure.singleUse: This link works once, then expires
translations.auth.resetPassword.success.title: Password updated
translations.auth.resetPassword.success.message: You're all set. Sign in with your new password to continue.
translations.auth.resetPassword.invalidLink.title: This link isn't valid
translations.auth.resetPassword.invalidLink.message: The reset link is missing or incomplete. Request a new one and we'll email you a fresh link.
translations.auth.resetPassword.title: Set a new password
translations.auth.resetPassword.subtitle: Enter and confirm your new password.
translations.auth.resetPassword.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid, expired, or already used. Please request a new one.
translations.auth.resetPassword.newPassword.label: New password
translations.auth.resetPassword.confirmPassword.label: Confirm password
translations.auth.register.headline: Create your patient account.
translations.auth.register.lede: A single, secure account to keep your care with Hospital Santa María in one place — set it up in a minute.
translations.auth.register.reassure.free: Free to set up, yours to keep
translations.auth.register.reassure.privacy: Your details stay private and protected
translations.auth.register.title: Create account
translations.auth.register.subtitle: Set up your patient account to get started.
translations.auth.register.firstName.label: First name
translations.auth.register.lastName.label: Last name
translations.auth.register.username.label: Username
translations.auth.register.email.label: Email
translations.auth.register.password.label: Password
translations.auth.register.error: Could not create your account. Try again.
translations.workspace.home.subtitle: Jump back into your work.
translations.workspace.home.link.templates.label: Templates
translations.workspace.home.link.documents.label: Documents
translations.workspace.home.link.profile.label: Your profile
translations.workspace.home.link.users.label: Users
translations.workspace.home.link.settings.label: Settings
translations.patient.home.lede: Your account is ready. We're putting the finishing touches on your personal records — for now, here's how to reach us whenever you need care.
translations.patient.home.contact.title: Reach the hospital
translations.patient.home.contact.address.label: Address
translations.patient.home.contact.hours.label: Hours
translations.patient.home.contact.hours.value: Front desk open daily, 7:00 AM – 8:00 PM
translations.patient.home.contact.emergency.label: Emergency
translations.patient.home.contact.emergency.value: For a medical emergency, call your local emergency number.
translations.patient.home.coming.title: Your records are on the way
translations.patient.home.coming.body: Soon you'll see your appointments, documents, and care team here, all in one place. We'll let you know the moment it's ready — nothing for you to do until then.
translations.onboarding.setup.headline: Let's set up your account.
translations.onboarding.setup.lede: Your account was created by an administrator. Choose your own password and confirm how we can reach you — then you're ready to work.
translations.onboarding.setup.title: Finish setting up
translations.onboarding.setup.subtitle: Set a new password and confirm your contact details to continue.
translations.onboarding.setup.newPassword.label: New password
translations.onboarding.setup.confirmPassword.label: Confirm password
translations.onboarding.setup.phoneNumber.label: Phone number
translations.onboarding.setup.confirmEmail.label: Confirm email
translations.onboarding.setup.confirmEmail.error: Enter the email on your account.
translations.onboarding.setup.error: We couldn't complete setup. Check your details and try again.
translations.profile.header.title: Your profile
translations.profile.header.subtitle: Update your name, email, and password.
translations.profile.info.title: Profile
translations.profile.info.firstName.label: First name
translations.profile.info.email.label: Email
translations.profile.info.error: Could not update your profile. Please try again.
translations.profile.password.title: Password
translations.profile.password.hint: Enter your current password to set a new one.
translations.profile.password.current.label: Current password
translations.profile.password.new.label: New password
translations.profile.password.new.error: New password must be at least 8 characters.
translations.profile.password.confirm.label: Confirm new password
translations.profile.password.error: Could not change your password. Please try again.
translations.placeholder.module.subtitle: Navigation and routing for this area are wired; the screen itself is a placeholder until the module is built.
translations.documents.page.title: Documents
translations.documents.page.subtitle: Generate documents from a template, browse your library, and upload files.
translations.documents.generate.title: Generate from template
translations.documents.generate.hint: Pick a DOCS template, fill in its fields, and generate a document.
translations.documents.generate.template.label: Template
translations.documents.generate.titleField.label: Title
translations.documents.generate.error.timeout: Generation is taking too long. Please check the library later.
translations.documents.upload.title: Upload
translations.documents.upload.hint: Upload an existing file straight into your library.
translations.documents.library.title: Library
translations.documents.library.column.title: Title
translations.settings.page.title: Settings
translations.settings.page.subtitle: Preferences that control how the app behaves for you. These apply to your account only.
translations.settings.group.appearance.title: Appearance
translations.settings.group.appearance.hint: Density and display preferences for your sessions.
translations.settings.group.notifications.title: Notifications
translations.settings.group.notifications.hint: Choose which in-app and email notifications you receive.
translations.settings.group.language.title: Language & region
translations.settings.group.language.hint: Interface language, date, and number formats.
translations.admin.settings.page.title: Runtime settings
translations.admin.settings.page.subtitle: Live operational configuration applied without a redeploy. Secret values are masked and never displayed — leave a secret blank to keep it.
translations.admin.settings.secret.placeholderSet: A value is set — leave blank to keep it
translations.admin.settings.secret.hint: A value is stored. Leave blank to keep it unchanged.
translations.admin.settings.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
translations.admin.settings.toast.nothingToSave.detai: No changes to apply for this category.
translations.admin.users.page.title: Users
translations.admin.users.page.subtitle: Review console accounts and manage their assigned roles.
translations.admin.users.table.name: Name
translations.admin.users.detail.username.label: Username
translations.admin.users.detail.email.label: Email
translations.admin.users.detail.name.label: Name
translations.admin.users.detail.roles.label: Role(s)
translations.admin.users.create.lede: Provision a console account. A temporary password is emailed to the new staff member, who sets their own on first sign-in.
translations.admin.users.create.firstName.label: First name
translations.admin.users.create.lastName.label: Last name
translations.admin.users.create.username.label: Username
translations.admin.users.create.email.label: Email
translations.admin.users.create.role.label: Role
translations.admin.users.create.tempPassword.label: Temporary password
translations.admin.users.create.success: Staff account "{$USERNAME}" created. A temporary password was emailed.
translations.admin.users.create.error: Could not create the staff account.
translations.templates.editor.page.title: Template editor
translations.templates.editor.page.subtitle: Author Handlebars templates with a live, sandboxed preview. Save renders the true server-composed output for confirmation before persisting.
translations.templates.editor.metadata.name.label: Name
translations.templates.editor.metadata.category.label: Category
translations.templates.editor.frame.content.label: TEMPLATE · HANDLEBARS
translations.templates.editor.frame.sampleData.label: SAMPLE DATA · JSON
translations.templates.editor.frame.preview.label: PREVIEW
translations.templates.confirm.hint: This is the true output composed by the server (including base-template composition). It may differ from the live preview. Confirm to save, or cancel to keep editing.
translations.layout.viewTabs.label: Views
